slides.headline: Stay Ahead of Chapter 33 Changes
slides.body: Get ready for new GI Bill regulations effective October 2024.

slides.headline: New Payment Rates
slides.body: Understand the updated payment rates for the Post-9/11 GI Bill.
bullets: Apply to your student aid plans

slides.headline: Eligibility Adjustments
slides.body: Changes to eligibility criteria for students under the Post-9/11 GI Bill.

slides.headline: COE Processing
slides.body: Impact of Chapter 33 updates on Certificate of Eligibility (COE) processing.

slides.headline: Compliance Matters
slides.body: Ensure your institution complies with the new regulations.

slides.headline: Yellow Ribbon Program
slides.body: New developments in the Yellow Ribbon Program.
Learn more about the changes and how to prepare. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Stay ahead of Chapter 33 updates with these key takeaways. Get ready for new payment rates, eligibility criteria, and COE processing changes. Ensure your institution complies and supports student veterans. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is 'Eligibility Adjustments' as it has the least amount of content and could benefit from a more detailed call to action.
